subcodes.first_line: O thou lady of the Kingdom! Thy letter sent from New York hath been received. Its contents imparted joy and gladness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خانم ملکوتی نامه شما از نیویورک رسید از مضمون خوشنودی حاصل شد زیرا دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
